records.question: Which users named Helen have reviewed the item titled avocado?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE item.title = 'avocado' AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT useracct.u_id
FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Helen' AND item.title = 'avocado'

records.question: Which users named Helen gave a rating of exactly 10 and a rank of at least 1 to the item titled orange?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE review.rating = 10 AND useracct.name = 'Helen' AND item.title = 'orange' AND review.rank >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT useracct.u_id
FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Helen'
AND review.rating = 10
AND review.rank >= 1
AND item.title = 'orange'

records.question: Which user accounts have written reviews with a rank of at least 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE review.rank >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT useracct.u_id
FROM useracct
INNER JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE review.rank >= 1

records.question: Which of Helen's user accounts have reviews with a rating of exactly 7 and a rank of exactly 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Helen' AND review.rating = 7 AND review.rank = 3
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT useracct.u_id
FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Helen'
AND review.rating = 7
AND review.rank = 3

records.question: Which users named Helen have reviews with a rank of at least 5 and a rating of at most 5?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE review.rank >= 5 AND review.rating <= 5 AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT useracct.u_id
FROM useracct
INNER JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Helen'
AND review.rank >= 5
AND review.rating <= 5

records.question: Which user accounts have given a review with a rating of exactly 10?
records.gold_sql:

JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE review.rating = 10
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT useracct.u_id
FROM useracct
INNER JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
